[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01011001 4
1 01011111 6
2 10001100 3
3 10000011 3
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 11000101 4

01 10 01000100 2
12 21 01000000 1
23 32 00011000 2
34 43 00011000 2
45 54 01011001 4 match 0
56 65 00001100 2
67 76 10000000 1
70 07 10000001 2

13 31 00000000 a match 4 5 6

61 16 00000100 1
72 27 10000001 2
